age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in social sciences discipline (55% minimum) with NET/M.Phil. /Ph.D. for Research Assistant; Graduate/Post Graduate in social sciences discipline with a minimum of 55% marks for Field Investigator.
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Post Graduate in social sciences discipline (55% minimum) with NET/M.Phil. /Ph.D. Field Investigator: Graduate/Post Graduate in social sciences discipline with a minimum of 55% marks.

salary_details.pay_scale: Research Assistant: Rs. 37,000/- per month; Field Investigator: Rs. 20,000/- per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Nagaland University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Staff posts at Nagaland University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 10-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Staff at Nagaland University?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for Project Staff positions at Nagaland University, comprising 1 Research Assistant and 3 Field Investigators.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Research Assistant position, candidates must have a Post Graduate degree in a social sciences discipline with a minimum of 55% marks and must possess NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. qualification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: The Field Investigator role requires candidates to have a Graduate or Post Graduate degree in a social sciences discipline with a minimum of 55% marks.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant and Field Investigator positions?
faq.answer: The Research Assistant will receive a salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month, while the Field Investigator will be paid Rs. 20,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Project Staff recruitment at Nagaland University?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email. The application, along with all required documents, should be sent to the Project Director at [email protected].

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: The application should include a signed cover letter, an updated Curriculum Vitae (CV), and self-attested scanned copies of all relevant certificates, mark sheets, and experience documents, all merged into a single PDF file.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these Project Staff positions?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Screening/Selection Committee and an Interview, which may be conducted online or offline.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for Nagaland University Project Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
